research_basis: Scope management defines what work is required and ensures only that work is done.
Explicit inclusions and exclusions reduce scope creep and ambiguity.
rules: In-scope and out-of-scope lists are both required.
No normalized item may appear in both lists.
At least one blocking acceptance boundary is required.
Scope changes require a new governed stage and receipt.
SSO cannot implement downstream RRP or export-promotion work.
